---
title: "AI"
---

The AI application page tracks phase channels, coil attention, cyclic memory, and adapter/block indexing. Local compute language is MLX/Mac-first.

The current proved layer is finite indexing only. `AIA-B0001` adds an exploratory deterministic phase-channel benchmark fixture for a known-period synthetic task, but it is not a model-quality claim.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIA-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0001"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0001"></div>

<div class="dictionary-box" data-dictionary-id="COMMON-0039"></div>

::: {.warning-box}
Python and optional MLX benchmark fixtures are executable references only. They do not replace Lean proofs and do not prove that circles improve neural networks.
:::

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
